metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace publishing hive-mind: persistent memory for Claude Code with MCP server, hooks, and slash commands.

plugins.name: hive-mind
plugins.description: Local-first persistent memory + in-loop context for Claude Code. SQLite-backed, MCP-compatible, semantic + FTS5 hybrid search. Validated against LoCoMo at 73.1% with Opus 4.7 (+4.6pp over Mem0 paper baseline).
